case_title: HEE KYEONG SEO ET AL VS. MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEO, HEE KYEONG LIM, JUN YOUNG (JORDAN ) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $585.00 FILED BY SEO, HEE KYEONG LIM, JUN YOUNG (JORDAN ) AS TO DEFENDANT MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $20.00 SERVED OCT-31-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF HEE KYEONG SEO AND JUN YOUNG LIM ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE, REPRESENTED BY JASON RAMIREZ, OPERATIONS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JASON RAMIREZ, OPERATIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB-03-2020
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
